description: Style NoteIf you want a bag that's funky, stylish, cool and comfortable to carry around all day, check out this piece from adidas. Carry it to college, work or on a casual day out with your friends.Product DetailsWhite and black messenger bag with a photographic print on the front, one main zipped compartment with inner slide pocket, one adjustable shoulder strap, branding on the front, white piping along the edges, feet on the baseMaterial and Care100% PESWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustSizeHeight: 28 cmWidth: 39 cmDepth: 13 cm
